description: Pre-defined MNIST train/test split for CNN homework exercise. Uses the official MNIST split.

train.note: Use train=True when loading with torchvision.datasets.MNIST

test.note: Use train=False when loading with torchvision.datasets.MNIST

preprocessing.note: Images are 28x28 grayscale — preserve the 2D spatial structure for CNN input. Do NOT flatten the images.

load_function_hint: See load_splits() in the starter code. DO NOT MODIFY THIS FILE.

guard.warning: ⚠️ DO NOT MODIFY THIS FILE. The agent must never alter mnist_splits.json. This file defines the canonical train/test split for reproducibility and fair comparison across students.
